testcase.name: test_multichip_profile_internal_stacked_prefill[blackhole-mesh_device0-device_params0]

failure.message: ValueError: hidden_states must have shape [1, 32, seq, 5120], got (1, 1, 18, 5120)

testcase.failure:
mesh_device = MeshDevice(1x4 grid, 4 devices)
@pytest.mark.parametrize("device_params", STACK_DEVICE_PARAMS, indirect=True) @pytest.mark.parametrize("mesh_device", MESH_PARAMS, indirect=True) def test_multichip_profile_internal_stacked_prefill(mesh_device): """Profile only the stack-preserving two-layer prefill region."""
if os.environ.get(PROFILE_STACKED_PREFILL_ENV) != "1": pytest.skip(f"Set {PROFILE_STACKED_PREFILL_ENV}=1 to profile stacked prefill") iterations = int(os.environ.get(PERF_ITERS_ENV, "1")) active_batch = int(os.environ.get(ACTIVE_BATCH_ENV, EMITTED_BATCH)) config = _config() decoder = MultichipDecoder.from_state_dict( _real_state(), hf_config=config, layer_idx=LAYER_IDX, mesh_device=mesh_device ) first_caches = _multichip_caches(config, mesh_device) second_caches = _multichip_caches(config, mesh_device) generator = torch.Generator().manual_seed(2519) hidden = torch.randn( (1, active_batch, EMITTED_PREFILL_SEQUENCE, config.hidden_size), generator=generator, dtype=torch.bfloat16, ) > stacked_input, logical_seq_len = decoder.prepare_prefill_residual(_mesh_input(hidden, mesh_device)) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
models/autoports/mistralai_mistral_small_24b_instruct_2501/tests/test_multichip_decoder.py:1067: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ models/autoports/mistralai_mistral_small_24b_instruct_2501/tt/multichip_decoder.py:974: in prepare_prefill_residual seq_len = self._validate_hidden_states(hidden_states) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
self = <models.autoports.mistralai_mistral_small_24b_instruct_2501.tt.multichip_decoder.MultichipDecoder object at 0x75110d1bd220> hidden_states = device_id: 3, MeshCoordinate([0, 0]) ttnn.Tensor([[[[ 3.4943e-03, 2.5391e-02, ..., -6.3281e-01, -1.7891e+00], ...e+00, ..., 7.1875e-01, 2.0156e+00]]]], shape=Shape([1, 1, 18, 5120]), dtype=DataType::BFLOAT16, layout=Layout::TILE) expected_seq_len = None
def _validate_hidden_states(self, hidden_states, expected_seq_len: int | None = None) -> int: shape = tuple(hidden_states.shape) if len(shape) != 4 or shape[0] != 1 or shape[1] != self.batch or shape[3] != self.hidden_size: > raise ValueError(f"hidden_states must have shape [1, {self.batch}, seq, {self.hidden_size}], got {shape}") E ValueError: hidden_states must have shape [1, 32, seq, 5120], got (1, 1, 18, 5120)
models/autoports/mistralai_mistral_small_24b_instruct_2501/tt/functional_decoder.py:244: ValueError
